title: Rich TUI components: dialogs, menus, model picker, theme picker
description:
CC has 389 component files (Ink/React); OC has 5 files in tui/. Missing rich components used in every session.

## Priority components
- ModelPicker (CC: components/ModelPicker.tsx) — interactive list with effort preview
- AskUserQuestion dialog
- ModePicker (behavior mode switching)
- NotificationBar (transient status messages)
- HelpOverlay (keybindings cheatsheet)
- LogSelector (resume picker with transcript preview)

## Scope
- Extend src/tui/ with one file per component
- Each component is a ratatui widget with its own state machine
- App state routes to active component via Screen enum
